home.heroText: Empowering the <1>hands</1> that clothe the nation
home.testimonial1Quote: It has been really good. I've been using it for 6 months, and it was easy to set up without any tutorial.
home.testimonial2Quote: I've been using this for 3 years and it's been very effective. My leg pain is gone, and work feels much more comfortable.

product.description: Modha Pedal Operation Machine is designed to improve the comfort and efficiency of traditional handloom weaving. It upgrades the existing pedal system with a smoother and more responsive mechanism, reducing the physical effort required by the weaver. This makes the weaving process easier, less tiring, and more productive while still maintaining the traditional setup.
product.feature1: Comfortable pedal design that reduces strain
product.feature4: Reduces fatigue for longer working hours
product.feature5: Easy to install on existing handlooms
product.feature6: Strong and durable for daily use
product.watchToInstall: Watch to Install on your own

innovations.card1Desc: Modha Jacquard Machine is designed to improve the efficiency and precision of traditional handloom weaving. It upgrades the existing jacquard system with a digital mechanism, replacing manual punch cards with an easy-to-use USB-based design process.
innovations.card2Desc: Modha Pedal Operation Machine is designed to improve the comfort and efficiency of traditional handloom weaving. It upgrades the existing pedal system with a smoother and more responsive mechanism, reducing the physical effort required.
innovations.card3Desc: An innovative waste management solution designed for handloom communities, turning discarded materials into useful products while promoting sustainability and cleanliness in weaving clusters.
innovations.card4Desc: A safety device designed to protect weavers from injuries during the weaving process. Raksha ensures that the weaver can work without fear of accidents, improving both safety and productivity.

ourStory.timeline1Text: It began with a simple question. In a small weaving village near Hindupuram, Sivakumar Modha sat beside a loom and quietly watched a weaver at work. When he asked if there was a better way, the weaver replied, "If it comes, our lives will change." That answer stayed with him.
ourStory.timeline2Text: Born to a school watchman and a school aide, he was expected to follow a stable path. Against his father's wishes, he walked away and stepped into the unfamiliar world of looms. With just ₹2000, he left home, promising his mother he would return only after he succeeded.
ourStory.timeline3Text: Then life tested him. He lost his father. He faced ridicule. Years passed without seeing his family, but he kept going, holding on to one belief — if he could solve this, he could change lives. The journey was long and uncertain. Many ideas failed.
ourStory.timeline4Text: In Hyderabad, through years of persistence, he built an electronic jacquard system that removed the need for punch cards, reducing cost and giving weavers more freedom to create. But he knew the deeper problem still remained — the pain.
ourStory.timeline5Text: After years of effort, the Modha Pedal Operating Machine came to life. A system that transfers the physical burden from the weaver's body to a motor, without changing the traditional loom or the essence of the craft.
ourStory.timeline6Text: Today, across India, thousands of looms carry his impact quietly. Elderly weavers returned to their looms. Women could continue their work without constant strain. Even physically challenged artisans found a way back to weaving.
ourStory.guidancePara1: Guiding him through this journey was the constant mentorship of Brigadier P. Ganesham, associated with Palle Srujana. More than a mentor, he became a guiding force and a source of unwavering belief.
ourStory.guidancePara2: Through his support and direction, Sivakumar found clarity in moments of doubt and strength in moments of struggle. The encouragement and ecosystem provided by Palle Srujana played a crucial role in shaping this journey.
ourStory.guidancePara3: With continued support from organizations like National Innovation Foundation and Telangana Innovation Cell, the impact only grew stronger.
ourStory.visionText: To empower every handloom weaver by making weaving comfortable, sustainable, and accessible without losing its traditional essence.
ourStory.missionText: To design simple, affordable, and practical innovations that reduce physical strain, improve efficiency, and enhance the livelihoods of weavers across communities.
